name: Kanzashi the Rikka Flower
desc:
2+ level 8 monster
(You can also xyz summon this card by using your kanzashi the rikka queen)
You can return 3 Rikka monster in your GY, draw 2 card
Detach 2 materials: When you opponent active a card effect, negate that effect then tribute 1 random card in your opponent hand. This is a quick effect if this card has a plant monster as material.
Detach 1 materials from this card, add from you deck to your hand 1 Rikka card.
strings: Xyz Summon using Kanzashi the Rikka Queen
Negate effect and Tribute 1 card in opponent's hand
